layout.title: Tune the room
layout.description: Keep the focus space quiet, personal, and ready.

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose the language used throughout FocusOS.
language.saveFailed: Language changed locally, but could not sync with your account.

blacklist.title: Distraction boundaries
blacklist.description: Choose domains that should gently interrupt Normal Mode sessions.
blacklist.empty: No boundaries have been added yet.

account.title: Data and deletion
account.description: Export your account data or start the account deletion flow.
account.exportDescription: Request a ZIP export of your profile, preferences, sessions, and study data.
account.deleteDescription: This starts the backend account deletion job and logs you out. Enter your password and type DELETE to confirm.

messages.exportPending: Account export is being prepared. Use Check status to refresh.
messages.exportReady: Account export is ready to download.
messages.exportExpired: This account export has expired. Request a new export.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: The identity shown around your focus workspace.
profile.emailHelp: Contact support if you need to change this email.
profile.signOutDescription: Logging out closes this browser session.

errors.min: Display name must be at least 2 characters
errors.max: Display name must be less than 50 characters

notificationsPage.title: Calm reminders
notificationsPage.description: Choose which cues should interrupt you and which can wait.
notificationsPage.sessionRemindersDescription: Reminders to start your daily focus session.
notificationsPage.weeklyReportDescription: Analysis of your weekly focus patterns.
notificationsPage.deepWorkSuggestionsDescription: Ideas for when to schedule deeper work.
notificationsPage.centerDescription: Backend currently supports notification settings and test notification creation, but does not expose a notification list or mark-as-read endpoint yet.

extensionPage.title: Browser bridge
extensionPage.description: The extension helps FocusOS understand tab context during active sessions.
extensionPage.connectedDescription: Live distraction detection is ready for your next session.
extensionPage.notDetectedDescription: You can still start sessions, but live tab detection may be limited.
extensionPage.installDescription: Install the FocusOS browser extension to support real-time distraction detection and focus scoring.

needs.tabs: Read tab context during focus sessions.
needs.warnings: Display distraction warnings when boundaries are crossed.
needs.metadata: Use page metadata to support Deep Work relevance scoring.

themePage.title: Ambient appearance
themePage.description: Preview the visual language used across FocusOS. Theme and accent are saved to your account.
themePage.backgroundDescription: Upload a local image for the focus room background.
themePage.imageHelp: JPG, PNG, or WebP up to 2.5 MB
themePage.displayDescription: These display controls do not have backend support yet.

errors.imageSize: Image must be 2.5 MB or smaller.
errors.browserStorage: This image is too large for browser storage.
